page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6r.8xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance powered by the 64-bit ARM architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores using the Ampere Altra processor running at 2.8 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that avoids hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate average capabilities across most compute and memory tasks. The single-core performance is moderate, as shown by a stress-ng single-core score of 1789.68 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1072.0. However, multi-threaded execution is highly efficient, highlighted by a strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression score of 217.66 GB/sec and a multi-core stress-ng score of 57239.02. Memory bandwidth tests show 156.84 GB/sec for large block read-only operations and 75.84 GB/sec for large block write operations.

This hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for multi-threaded applications that benefit from dedicated physical cores without the overhead of hyperthreading. The server is well-suited for workloads such as static web serving, software compilation, database operations, and multi-threaded data decompression. It can also handle light language model inference, achieving 37.49 tokens per second for prompt processing on a 7B model.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6r.8xlarge is an ARM-based, compute-optimized server instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Ampere Altra processor running at 2.8 GHz. With 64.0 GB of RAM, it provides a 2.0 GB per core memory ratio, operating under a KVM hypervisor with an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware. Benchmark results demonstrate average performance across most metrics, with notable strength in multi-threaded tasks such as bzip3 decompression, which reached 217.66 GB/sec. Single-core performance remains moderate. This configuration offers a resource-dense, cost-efficient option for parallelized workloads that do not require hyperthreading. It is suited for static web serving, software compilation, database operations, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6r.8xlarge is an ARM-based compute-optimized server with 32 dedicated Ampere Altra cores, 64 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, suited for multi-threaded workloads.

tagline: An ARM-powered compute-optimized instance featuring thirty-two dedicated physical cores for efficient multi-threaded processing and parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated physical Ampere Altra ARM cores at 2.8 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory with no hyperthreading overhead
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth under KVM hypervisor
Strong multi-threaded performance in data decompression and compilation
Suited for static web serving, database operations, and parallel processing
